style_effects: Constant static sparks crackle in electric blue and white, drifting erratically around the bulbous body like miniature lightning bolts. A pulsing electromagnetic aura glows with vibrant yellow-white intensity, distorting the air in concentric rings around the Pokémon. The eyes and tail emit rhythmic, high-energy flashes of electric gold, casting sharp, dynamic shadows in a cool, high-contrast lighting mood. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
